content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the panel-backend parser/display changes in src/shared/domain.rs, config-set validation in src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs, and panel resolution in src/contexts/agent_execution/policy.rs, along with the added unit coverage. The legacy parenthesized-format regression appears fixed, inline model overrides still take precedence during panel resolution, and I did not find additional correctness or robustness issues in this change set.

## Amendments

None.
